title: CDC Vanilla+
description: The CDC Vanilla+ Modpack is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack aimed at enhancing the vanilla experience through performance optimizations and server improvements. It integrates essential mods for reducing lag, improving FPS, and ensuring server stabili
body:
# CDC Vanilla+ Modpack

Welcome to the CDC Vanilla+ Modpack, a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed to enhance both server and client performance while maintaining the essence of the vanilla experience. This modpack is perfect for players looking for a smoother gameplay without sacrificing the classic feel of Minecraft.

Key Features:
- Performance Enhancements: Includes several optimizations that reduce lag and improve overall game performance.

- Server Optimization: Features like automatic server restarts and the Spark profiler mod help in maintaining optimal server health by unloading heavy chunks and identifying lag sources


- Client-Side Improvements: Client-side mods are included to boost FPS and enhance the gaming experience on individual PCs

- Compatibility: The modpack is compatible with Fabric, ensuring wide compatibility with many other mods and stable performance
  
- User-Friendly: Easy installation and configuration with detailed guides available for setting up and optimizing both server and client performance

Whether you're running a server or playing solo, the CDC Vanilla+ Modpack is designed to provide an enhanced Minecraft experience with minimal hassle. Enjoy a stable, faster, and more enjoyable gameplay with our carefully selected mods. Join our community on Discord to discuss, get support, and share your experiences with the CDC Vanilla+ Modpack.
